LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_CloudProvidersDesc: Use cloud API services like OpenAI, DeepSeek, etc.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_LocalProviderDesc: Use locally running models like Player2
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_CloudApiConfigurationsDesc: Configure multiple API providers, the system will try to use available configs in order
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_ReplaceCommsConsoleDesc: Replace the vanilla comms console with diplomacy console, enabling AI dialogue features
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SpeedFastDesc: Fast mode: 0.02s/char, English letters faster. For quick plot skipping.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SpeedStandardDesc: Standard mode: 0.05s/char, English letters faster. Comfortable reading speed.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SpeedImmersiveDesc: Immersive mode: 0.11s/char, English letters faster. For savoring dialogues.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_PresenceCacheHours: Presence cache duration after closing window (hours): {0}
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_EnableBusyByHostiles: Busy check: hostile pawns on map
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_NpcPush_DebugTriggerFailed: Trigger failed: load a running save and ensure valid factions with AI configuration exist.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_PawnRpgPush_DebugTriggerFai: Trigger failed: ensure an eligible initiator pawn and a qualified receiver relation are available.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SocialForceGenerateSuccess: A social-circle post was generated immediately.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SocialForceGenerateFailed: Force generation failed: no eligible faction or system disabled.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SocialForceGenerateDisabled: The social circle is disabled, so force-generate is unavailable.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SocialForceGenerateGameHint: Force-generate is available only after loading a save.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SocialForceGenerateHint: This button is always visible. It generates one post instantly and reschedules the next auto post.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_ConnectionSuccess: Connection successful! API key is valid and response format is correct.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_LastDialogueTokenUsageNoDat: Recent dialogue token usage: no data
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_RaidIncomingDesc: {0} is launching a raid against your colony!
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_AIFactionRaidDesc: {0} has launched a raid against your colony due to poor relations.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_AIFactionCaravanDesc: A caravan from {0} is approaching for trade.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_AIFactionReinforceDesc: Reinforcements from {0} are arriving to assist you.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SocialUnavailable: Social circle data is currently unavailable.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SocialNoPosts: No posts match the current filter.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SocialLikeNoReward: Like recorded. No bonus goodwill this time.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SocialPostTemplatePositive: {0} posted publicly: positive stance toward {1} on {2}.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SocialPostTemplateNegative: {0} posted publicly: strong condemnation of {1} on {2}.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SocialPostTemplateNeutral: {0} posted publicly: neutral observation about {1} on {2}.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SocialPostTemplatePositiveL: {0} (Leader: {1}) issued a public statement on {5}, signaling goodwill toward {2} (Leader: {3}). {4}
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SocialPostTemplateNegativeL: {0} (Leader: {1}) issued a public statement on {5}, condemning {2} (Leader: {3}). {4}
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SocialPostTemplateNeutralLe: {0} (Leader: {1}) issued a public statement on {5}, remaining cautious toward {2} (Leader: {3}). {4}
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SocialImpactNarrativeGoodwi: Public mood is expected to shift faction attitudes toward the player.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SocialImpactNarrativeSettle: The faction announced expansion plans and may found a new settlement.
The faction shows internal instability and may lose one settlement.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SocialImpactNarrativeColdSn: Tensions around this statement may escalate into a cold snap event.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SocialImpactNarrativeBlight: Tensions around this statement may escalate into a blight event.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SocialPostSummaryFromDialog: This dialogue has sparked a public social-circle discussion.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SocialActionBlocked: Player-influence social posts are disabled, so publish action was ignored.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SocialActionPublished: A new public social-circle post has been published.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SocialActionKeywordCreated: This dialogue triggered a public social-circle discussion.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SelectFactionPrompt: Select a faction to view details.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_WelcomeMessage: Greetings. I am the leader of {0}. What brings you to us today?
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_AIResponseTrade: We would be interested in trade. Our caravan will arrive shortly.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_AIResponseAidYes: As allies, we shall send reinforcements to assist you.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_AIResponseAidNo: We are not yet close enough allies for such assistance. Improve our relations first.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_AIResponseWar: Do not threaten us! Such words may lead to consequences.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_AIResponsePeace: Peace is always preferable to war. We welcome friendly relations.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_AIResponseDefault: I understand. We shall consider your words carefully.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_AIControlledDesc: This faction uses AI for diplomatic decisions and may initiate dialogue
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_StandardBehaviorDesc: This faction uses standard RimWorld behavior patterns
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_CenterDropWarning: Warning: Center drop may cause severe damage to your colony!
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_GoodwillWarning: Warning: Single adjustment should not exceed half of daily limit
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_ResetSectionConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all settings in "{0}" to their default values? This action cannot be undone.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_FactionPromptSettingsDesc: Customize AI dialogue style and tone for each faction. Select a faction from the left to edit prompts on the right.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_GlobalPromptSettingsDesc: Configure base system prompts and dialogue templates applied to all faction conversations.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SystemPromptDesc: Define AI's base behavior patterns, role positioning, and global constraints
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_DialoguePromptDesc: Define the context structure and response format template for dialogues
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_PromptLengthWarning: Long prompts may cause API call failures or increased costs
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SelectFactionForPrompt: Please select a faction from the left to edit prompts
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_ResetPromptConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset {0}'s prompt to default?
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_ImportFailed: Import failed, please check file format
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_ResetAllPromptsConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all faction prompts to default? This cannot be undone.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_RPGSystemPromptDesc: Defines AI base behavior in RPG dialogue mode
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_RPGDialoguePromptDesc: Defines context structure in RPG dialogue mode
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SystemPromptPlaceholder: Enter system prompt here to define AI's base behavior...
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_PromptTooLong: Prompt too long! Please reduce content.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_ErrorNoConfig: No valid AI configuration found. Please configure API in mod settings.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_ErrorInvalidUrl: API URL must start with http:// or https://
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_Error401Local: Local model authentication failed: Please check if local service is running, or try leaving API Key empty in configuration
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_Error401Cloud: API key is invalid or expired. Please check API configuration in mod settings
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_Error404: Requested API endpoint does not exist. Please check Base URL configuration
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_ErrorConnectionLocal: Cannot connect to local model service. Please confirm: 1. Ollama/Player2 service is running 2. Port number is correct 3. Firewall is not blocking
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_ErrorConnectionCloud: Cannot connect to cloud API service. Please check network connection
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_ErrorTimeout: Request timeout. AI service response time is too long
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_ErrorRateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again later
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_PresenceBlockedOffline: Currently offline. You cannot send messages.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_PresenceBlockedDnd: Currently set to do not disturb. You cannot send messages.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_ConversationEnded: The other side ended this dialogue session.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_ConversationEndedReason: The other side ended this dialogue session: {0}
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SystemExitDialogue: The other side ended the current dialogue.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SystemExitDialogueWithReaso: The other side ended the current dialogue: {0}
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SystemSetDnd: The other side switched to do-not-disturb.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SystemSetDndWithReason: The other side switched to do-not-disturb: {0}
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_AdvancedPromptSettingsDesc: Configure various components of the system prompt. Supports simple and advanced mode switching.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SimpleModeHint: Simple Mode: Edit the global system prompt, other configs use default values
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_ResetPromptConfigConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all prompt configurations to default? This action cannot be undone.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SelectApiAction: Select an API action to edit
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_SelectDecisionRule: Select a decision rule to edit
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_ClickToTrade: Click here to open trade dialog
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_NegotiatorUnavailable: No negotiator available (colonist must use comms console)
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_UsePermitHint: Please use this permit from the colonist panel or world map.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_RPGPawnPersonaNeedGame: You need a loaded save to edit per-pawn persona prompts.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_RPGPawnPersonaNoPawn: No editable colony humanlike pawns were found.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_RPGPawnPersonaPromptDesc: This content is injected only for this pawn in RPG dialogue system prompts.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_EnvironmentSelectSceneHint: Select a scene entry from the list to edit.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_EnvironmentPreviewNoContext: No sample context available. Preview is empty.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_RpgPreviewNoContext: No sample pawns available for RPG preview.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_RPGDialogue_CooldownRejecte: They refuse to continue talking for now (about {0} hours remaining).
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_RPGDialogue_CooldownBlocked: They are not accepting dialogue right now (about {0} hours remaining).
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_RPGActionToast_CooldownAppl: System: dialogue cooldown applied for {0} day(s).
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_RPGSystem_MemoryRollFailed: System: memory roll failed (round {0}, target {1}%, roll {2}%).
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_RPGSystem_MemoryNoDef: System: memory roll passed, but no valid ThoughtDef was found.
LanguageData.RimDiplomacy_RPGSystem_MemoryRollSuccess: System: memory roll succeeded (round {0}, target {1}%, roll {2}%), auto-added {3}.
